QF.id: XXVA Regulatory Compliance for Non-Core Research Personnel_18

question.text: A part-time research analyst under SEBI RA Regulations is:

answer.text: Any analyst who works fewer than 8 hours a day
A person who provides research services on a part-time basis and is also engaged in other permitted business activities
An analyst who only covers small-cap stocks
Any analyst who has been in the profession for less than 2 years

explanation.text: **The Logic:** A part-time research analyst is one who provides research services on a part-time basis while being engaged in other business activities. The concept parallels the part-time investment adviser under IA Regulations. **The Trap:** Part-time status is about the nature of engagement (not full-time dedicated to research), not about working hours, coverage universe, or experience level. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series XV covers part-time RA registration requirements. Series X-A covers part-time IA requirements with similar concepts. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Part-time analysts may have additional conflict management requirements due to their other business activities — verify that proper Chinese Walls exist between their research and other activities.
